rewritten_requirements: The system shall start when it is not in use.
The system shall require inserting coins when the user picks up the receiver.
The system shall allow dialing a number only after sufficient credit has been added.
The system shall start the call when the dialed number is valid and the other party answers.
The system shall continue the call as long as there is sufficient credit.
The system shall end the call if the credit runs out during the call.
The system shall allow adding more coins to continue the call.
The system shall return any unused coins when the user hangs up.
The system shall return to an unused state after a call ends.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system starts when it is not being used.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: A phone starts when it is not being used.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: When the user picks up the receiver, they need to insert coins.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: When someone picks up the receiver, they need to insert coins.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system allows dialing a number only after sufficient credit is added.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Once enough credit is added, they can dial a number.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The call starts when the dialed number is valid and the other party answers.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the number is valid, the call starts when the other person answers.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system continues the call as long as there is enough credit.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: During the call, it continues as long as there is enough credit.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If the credit runs out during a call, the call ends.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the credit runs out, the call ends.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system allows adding more coins to continue the call.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: At any time, the user can add more coins to continue.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Any unused coins are returned when the user hangs up.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If they hang up, any unused coins are returned.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system returns to an unused state after a call ends.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: and the phone goes back to being unused.
